title: Wire app.routes.ts and reception.routes.ts for the /reception/onboarding parallel route branch
acceptance_criteria: In src/app/app.routes.ts: entry added for path 'reception/onboarding' with loadComponent pointing to OnboardingShell and loadChildren pointing to onboardingRoutes
The new reception/onboarding entry is placed BEFORE the existing /reception entry so Angular matches it first
In src/app/features/reception/reception.routes.ts: entry added for path 'onboarding' with redirectTo '/reception/onboarding/home' and pathMatch: 'prefix'
completion_summary: Added reception/onboarding parallel route in app.routes.ts before /reception, and onboarding redirect entry in reception.routes.ts
